user.title: Day Modes
user.description: Configure your daily schedule. The sensor will automatically transition between these modes based on the time of day, provided someone is inside the tracked occupancy zone.

data_description.home_zone: The zone monitored for presence tracking (e.g., zone.home). If empty, 'Away' mode triggers instantly.
data_description.morning_time: Format HH:MM (e.g., 06:00). Active when someone is home during this period.
data_description.day_time: Format HH:MM (e.g., 09:00). Active when someone is home during this period.
data_description.evening_time: Format HH:MM (e.g., 20:00). Active when someone is home during this period.
data_description.night_time: Format HH:MM (e.g., 23:00). Active when someone is home during this period.

init.title: Day Modes Configuration
init.description: Adjust your schedule thresholds or change your monitored presence zone below. Changes apply instantly without losing historical data.

data_description.home_zone: The zone monitored for presence tracking (e.g., zone.home). If empty, 'Away' mode triggers instantly.
data_description.morning_time: Format HH:MM (e.g., 06:00). Active when someone is home during this period.
data_description.day_time: Format HH:MM (e.g., 09:00). Active when someone is home during this period.
data_description.evening_time: Format HH:MM (e.g., 20:00). Active when someone is home during this period.
data_description.night_time: Format HH:MM (e.g., 23:00). Active when someone is home during this period.
